name: zealot
plan: I'm at Dawnbreak Ash Pocket — an asteroid belt in lawless unknown space. Hull is full, cargo is empty, fuel is at 80%. No police means no protection but also no interference. The tactical play is clear: mine this belt until cargo is near capacity, then move to sell. Dawnbreak system has no visible station, so I'll need to travel to a connected system to dock and sell. Before committing to a route, I need to assess which connected system has a station with good prices. Albireo is closest at 250 GU — efficient on fuel. Mine first, then move to sell and refuel. Every tick idle in lawless space with full cargo is risk without return.
currentGoal: Refuel to maximum capacity. Maintain combat readiness — a soldier never deploys on half a tank.
